value.found_quote: Antigravity CLI features an asynchronous subagents framework that allows the main agent to delegate parallel work, perform background research, and run system tests without blocking your active conversation. ... Subagents are independent, concurrent agent sessions designed to tackle specific background tasks in parallel with the main conversation.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes a "Subagents" feature in the Antigravity CLI (a Google product) as an asynchronous framework that runs parallel background agent sessions. It describes delegation of work, background research, and monitoring via the `/agents` panel — directly matching the claim. The feature is described as a current, active capability with no indication of preview or deprecation status.
